name: pitch-deck-designer
description: Visual-first investor pitch deck designer for B2B channel partners (mall operators, EOs, food courts) and equity VCs. Generates per-slide markdown spec with GeminiGen.AI image prompts, Seedance 2.0 video animation prompts, optional Remotion configs, and Indonesian-aware speaker notes. Dual-mode adaptive (B2B-adoption vs VC-fundraise) with proven 10-slide narrative arc, anti-AI-slop visual rules, and a 100-point validation gate (Visual Ratio + Narrative Arc + Ask Clarity + Investor Psychology + Anti-Slop).
